# Documentation Templates

This folder contains reusable templates for future engineering work.

## Responsibility

- Standardize repeated documentation types.
- Reduce ambiguity in reviews.
- Keep blueprints, ADRs, runbooks and handoffs consistent.

## Templates

- `adr-template.md`
- `blueprint-template.md`
- `runbook-template.md`
- `agent-handoff-template.md`
- `pr-review-template.md`
